name: Venty Vaporizer
summary: A fast-heating, high-airflow portable from Storz & Bickel for patients who want strong draws on the move.
description: The Venty is Storz & Bickel's German-made portable vaporiser with hybrid convection and conduction heating, a ceramic chamber and degree-by-degree control from 40°C to 210°C. It heats in around 20 seconds and adds adjustable airflow, so you can set a gentle or a powerful draw to suit how you medicate. USB-C charging and a glass-cooled vapour path round it out. It suits patients who want fast, high-output sessions and S&B build quality in a portable form. At 252g it is on the heavier side for a pocket device, the trade for its airflow and power.
